title: Minimum Time to Collect All Apples in a Tree
titleCn: 收集树上所有苹果的最少时间

testcases.input: n = 7, edges = [[0,1],[0,2],[1,4],[1,5],[2,3],[2,6]], hasApple = [false,false,true,false,true,true,false] Output: 8 Explanation: The figure above represents the given tree where red vertices have an apple. One optimal path to collect all apples is shown by the green arrows.
testcases.expectedOutput: 8 Explanation: The figure above represents the given tree where red vertices have an apple. One optimal path to collect all apples is shown by the green arrows.
